titleStmt.title: United States Delegation Working Paper This paper, presumably a United States Delegation working paper prepared for Truman, was apparently before the President during the course of the meeting. For the documents referred to, see the footnotes to the Thompson minutes, infra.

head.note: This paper, presumably a United States Delegation working paper prepared for Truman, was apparently before the President during the course of the meeting. For the documents referred to, see the footnotes to the Thompson minutes, infra.

div.p: Agenda for Meeting of Heads of Three Governments July 20, 1945 4:00 p.m.

list.item: Council of Ministers.At this point is the following manuscript notation by Truman: “disposed of”.
Italy in the United Nations, including reference to Spain.At this point is the following manuscript notation by Truman: “Referred to For[eign] Sec[retarie]s”.
Vienna—Austria (paper to be presented by Mr. Churchill).At this point is the following manuscript notation by Truman: “Settled”.
Western frontiers of Poland (paper presented by U. S. S. R. this morning).At the end of this item is the following manuscript notation by Truman: “Postponed”.
Trusteeship (paper presented by U. S. S. R. this morning).At the end of this item is the following manuscript notation by Truman: “Postponed”.
Turkey (paper to be presented by Mr. Churchill).At the end of this item is the following manuscript notation by Truman: “Postponed”.
